title: Palamod Renew Faithful
description: Resource pack compatible with Palamod Renew
body:
## The Official Faithful Ressource pack for Palamod Renew
####  [Warning : The ressource pack only change the texture from the mod [Palamod Renew](https://modrinth.com/mod/palamod-renew), except for some Minecraft GUI who are remade by the Palamod Renew and rechange in this one, else no Minecraft texture (Vanilla block, items) and not replaced] 

The pack change all texture to more detailed one with a new different style

Here some examples in game 

New **Hotbar**  :
![hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/860de2519afe7b7e6c8acf7a03cc0eab021accf5.png)

Main Menu new GUI :
![Main menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aff55d784493d9b32d61d85846d560d7587b67d8.png)

Some modded Block who are remade :
![blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0759432a03a9f67feaf683aab5da0f96956fc8f3.png)
